visa_types.name: Entry Visa Application For Nationals
visa_types.documents_required:
Before Submission, kindly go through the list of items below and Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/66fJXCXr76Rn5omAfsxklX/87addc2180394027e94f04061259dc84/Checklist_Singapore_UK_new.pdf) to ensure that you have fully completed and furnished the necessary documents and ticks accordingly.
Applicants can submit their application through a third party via authorization letter without being present at the VFS in person.
Authorization Letter in original (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/singapore/thailand/english/pdf/Annex_C_Letter_of_Authorisation.pdf?_gl=1*63mvom*_gcl_au*MjA5MjcyMTc0OC4xNzc0MjU3MTQ1*_ga*MTg0NDE5NjQzOC4xNzc0MjU0MDYw*_ga_Z8LKRKHHG4*czE3NzkxMDQ2OTgkbzY2JGcxJHQxNzc5MTA4NDY1JGo2MCRsMCRoMA..) – completed and signed Authorization Letter in English given to a third party on the applicant’s behalf stating the purpose required. Copy of ID must be provided from the third party together with Authorization Letter.
The following basic documents are required for all types of visa applications.
- Duly completed and signed (Form 14A) 
(Any incomplete form or false declaration will result in the application being delayed or rejected respectively.)
- Original Passport (must have at least 6 months’ validity from the intended date of entry.)
- Photocopies of bio data page of the applicants passport
- One recent passport sized coloured photograph of the applicant. Please see ICA
Photo Guidelines (https://www.ica.gov.sg/photo-guidelines)  for information on photo requirements.
- UK eVisa share code proving your immigration status or multiple entry UK Visitor Visa valid beyond return date from Singapore
- Intended travel dates to Singapore, through a detailed trip itinerary. Any documents supporting the same (i.e. flight reservations) can be added to confirm your trip.

- The following additional documents are required to be submitted with the type of application as indicated below:

- For Business Visit
- Letter of Introduction (LOI)(Form V39A) (https://www.ica.gov.sg/docs/default-source/ica/forms/formv39a.pdf?sfvrsn=68a9dede_39)  and/or
- Letter from applicants employer or
- An invitation letter from Singapore Registered company and a computer printout of the Singapore registered company’s detailed business profile
- For Social Visit
- Hotel Reservation or Letter of Introduction (LOI) (Form V39A) (https://www.ica.gov.sg/docs/default-source/ica/forms/formv39a.pdf?sfvrsn=68a9dede_39)  (if any)
- For Medical Treatment
- Supporting letter furnished by the hospital stating the purpose of visa application and the applicant’s medical history.
Important Note: Please ensure that the application forms / all the necessary documents have been completed / furnished. Incomplete applications will be returned to you.
visa_types.visa_fees:
Visa Fees and VFS Global Service fee

[Table:   Entry Visa Application For Nationals]
Please Note:
																		
- The visa processing fee is non-refundable, regardless of the outcome of the application or if you choose to withdraw after the process of your visa application has commenced.
- The service fee is inclusive VAT (20%) and is non-refundable.
- Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost. Please see more detail from Additional Services tab.
The service fee and additional services at The Visa Application Centre are to be paid only in GBP. Cash payments are not accepted.
visa_types.processing_time: Visa application will be processed within three working days (excluding the day of submission). Some applications may take longer to process. Applicants need to plan their travel in advance as there is no facility for expediting the visa application process.
visa_types.forms:
Application Form (14 A)
V39A (LOI) (For Business and Social Visit) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3mYQZOHAA3KK3DaH5pyrWS/659d74b76517d43f5614519de34aa8e5/loi-v39a-mar-2022.pdf)
Authorization Letter (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/w9ueJMvXeN2U49mz5XluG/00e0a58a1c8f319810106831c06b2548/Annex_C_Letter_of_Authorisation.pdf)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Please note: Application can only be submitted within 30 days prior to arrival in Singapore

If you hold a travel document issued by one of the countries or places listed above, you will require a valid Singapore entry visa to travel to, and seek entry, into Singapore.
A Singapore entry visa is not an immigration pass. It is a pre-entry permission for the holder of a valid visa to travel to, and seek entry, into Singapore.
The grant of an immigration pass will be determined by the ICA officers at the point of entry. The period of stay granted is shown on the visit pass endorsement given on your passport and it is not tied to the validity of your visa.
Nationals holding travel documents issued by the following countries (https://www.ica.gov.sg/enter-depart/entry_requirements/visa_requirements) will require a visa to enter Singapore.
Please note: Application can only be submitted within 30 days prior to arrival in Singapore
If your travel document is issued by one of the countries/ places listed below, you will require a valid visa to enter Singapore. Click on individual countries/ places to find out more.
Please be informed that the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland Certificate of Travel {Certificat De Voyage} is not recognized as a valid travel document for entry into Singapore. As such, holders of said Document are not eligible for an entry visa for Singapore.

[Table:Entry Visa Application For Nationals]
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Please note: Application can only be submitted within 30 days prior to arrival in Singapore

If you hold a travel document issued by one of the countries or places listed above, you will require a valid Singapore entry visa to travel to, and seek entry, into Singapore.
A Singapore entry visa is not an immigration pass. It is a pre-entry permission for the holder of a valid visa to travel to, and seek entry, into Singapore.
The grant of an immigration pass will be determined by the ICA officers at the point of entry. The period of stay granted is shown on the visit pass endorsement given on your passport and it is not tied to the validity of your visa.
Nationals holding travel documents issued by the following countries (https://www.ica.gov.sg/enter-depart/entry_requirements/visa_requirements) will require a visa to enter Singapore.
Please note: Application can only be submitted within 30 days prior to arrival in Singapore
If your travel document is issued by one of the countries/ places listed below, you will require a valid visa to enter Singapore. Click on individual countries/ places to find out more.
Please be informed that the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland Certificate of Travel {Certificat De Voyage} is not recognized as a valid travel document for entry into Singapore. As such, holders of said Document are not eligible for an entry visa for Singapore.

[Table:Entry Visa Application For Nationals]

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees and VFS Global Service fee

[Table:   Entry Visa Application For Nationals]
Please Note:
																		
- The visa processing fee is non-refundable, regardless of the outcome of the application or if you choose to withdraw after the process of your visa application has commenced.
- The service fee is inclusive VAT (20%) and is non-refundable.
- Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost. Please see more detail from Additional Services tab.
The service fee and additional services at The Visa Application Centre are to be paid only in GBP. Cash payments are not accepted.

## Documents Required
Before Submission, kindly go through the list of items below and Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/66fJXCXr76Rn5omAfsxklX/87addc2180394027e94f04061259dc84/Checklist_Singapore_UK_new.pdf) to ensure that you have fully completed and furnished the necessary documents and ticks accordingly.
Applicants can submit their application through a third party via authorization letter without being present at the VFS in person.
Authorization Letter in original (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/singapore/thailand/english/pdf/Annex_C_Letter_of_Authorisation.pdf?_gl=1*63mvom*_gcl_au*MjA5MjcyMTc0OC4xNzc0MjU3MTQ1*_ga*MTg0NDE5NjQzOC4xNzc0MjU0MDYw*_ga_Z8LKRKHHG4*czE3NzkxMDQ2OTgkbzY2JGcxJHQxNzc5MTA4NDY1JGo2MCRsMCRoMA..) – completed and signed Authorization Letter in English given to a third party on the applicant’s behalf stating the purpose required. Copy of ID must be provided from the third party together with Authorization Letter.
The following basic documents are required for all types of visa applications.
- Duly completed and signed (Form 14A) 
(Any incomplete form or false declaration will result in the application being delayed or rejected respectively.)
- Original Passport (must have at least 6 months’ validity from the intended date of entry.)
- Photocopies of bio data page of the applicants passport
- One recent passport sized coloured photograph of the applicant. Please see ICA
Photo Guidelines (https://www.ica.gov.sg/photo-guidelines)  for information on photo requirements.
- UK eVisa share code proving your immigration status or multiple entry UK Visitor Visa valid beyond return date from Singapore
- Intended travel dates to Singapore, through a detailed trip itinerary. Any documents supporting the same (i.e. flight reservations) can be added to confirm your trip.

- The following additional documents are required to be submitted with the type of application as indicated below:

- For Business Visit
- Letter of Introduction (LOI)(Form V39A) (https://www.ica.gov.sg/docs/default-source/ica/forms/formv39a.pdf?sfvrsn=68a9dede_39)  and/or
- Letter from applicants employer or
- An invitation letter from Singapore Registered company and a computer printout of the Singapore registered company’s detailed business profile
- For Social Visit
- Hotel Reservation or Letter of Introduction (LOI) (Form V39A) (https://www.ica.gov.sg/docs/default-source/ica/forms/formv39a.pdf?sfvrsn=68a9dede_39)  (if any)
- For Medical Treatment
- Supporting letter furnished by the hospital stating the purpose of visa application and the applicant’s medical history.
Important Note: Please ensure that the application forms / all the necessary documents have been completed / furnished. Incomplete applications will be returned to you.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 3 months old) of yourself, meeting the  ICA Photo Guidelines. Details can be found here https://www.ica.gov.sg/photo-guidelines (https://www.ica.gov.sg/photo-guidelines)

## Processing Time
Visa application will be processed within three working days (excluding the day of submission). Some applications may take longer to process. Applicants need to plan their travel in advance as there is no facility for expediting the visa application process.

## Download Forms

Application Form (14 A)
V39A (LOI) (For Business and Social Visit) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3mYQZOHAA3KK3DaH5pyrWS/659d74b76517d43f5614519de34aa8e5/loi-v39a-mar-2022.pdf)
Authorization Letter (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/w9ueJMvXeN2U49mz5XluG/00e0a58a1c8f319810106831c06b2548/Annex_C_Letter_of_Authorisation.pdf)
